description:
Configure the organizational calendar by creating three records in the Holidays module:
- Holiday Date: 07/03/2026, Name: Independence Day Observed - Company-wide office closure., User: [None]
- Holiday Date: 11/26/2026, Name: Thanksgiving Day - Company-wide office closure., User: [None]
- Holiday Date: 08/14/2026, Name: Sarah PTO - Sarah Smith summer vacation., User: Sarah Smith
